reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for deterministic adapter discovery behavior; do not treat audience hints as final semantic truth or explicit discovery as runner honesty proof.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is a deterministic claim-discovery contract: adapter audience hints either label generated review queues, and review results can correct those labels, or they do not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused runtime tests: adapter audience_hints set user/developer claimAudience labels during discovery, and later review-result application can update claimAudience plus derived group hints.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing claim_discovery audience_hints normalization, claimAudience derivation, review-result application, or review-cluster labeling.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The claim is a deterministic adapter live-discovery contract: kind: explicit either validates and normalizes without a probe script, or it does not.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by focused runtime and CLI tests: explicit instance_discovery validates, and eval live discover emits a normalized catalog from adapter-declared instances without executing a command-backed probe.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep this claim covered when changing instance_discovery.kind explicit validation, live-discover normalization, or workbench instance catalog fields.
